title: Your Name
text:
Environmental Practice




Site Investigation & Subsurface Characterization
I lead and support Phase I and Phase II Environmental Site Assessments, groundwater monitoring network design, and subsurface investigations across complex regulatory environments.













Regulatory Strategy & Technical Reporting
I prepare defensible technical documentation supporting state and federal compliance frameworks, ensuring clarity, precision, and data integrity.









Environmental Data Analytics & GIS
I integrate hydrogeologic data, spatial analysis, and visualization tools to support risk-based decision making and stakeholder communication.
